title: Please allow us to opt out of 'pride' month animations.
excerpt:

posts.author: jaichele (Justin Aichele)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
My request is to allow users to opt out of any of the monthly animations that we may find either annoying or offensive. For example, I would like to opt out of ‘pride’ animations but not the rest of the months. It’s cumbersome to have to deactivate all of the animations for June and then reactivate after that.

I think this would best fit a diverse customer base.
